steps: The equation is 10x + 26,255 = 26,950. The structure is: (starting population) + (something times 10) = (ending population). The 10 represents the 10 years from 2000 to 2010.
Since x is multiplied by 10 years to give the total population change (695), x represents the change per year — the average annual increase. That matches choice B — B is correct.
choiceElimination:
• Choice A — 'The total increase in population between 2000 and 2010': The total increase is 695 (= 26,950 − 26,255), which is 10x, not x itself. ✗
  • Choice B — 'The average increase per year of the population between 2000 and 2010': x = 69.5 is the total increase (695) divided by the number of years (10), giving the average annual increase. ✓
  • Choice C — 'The percentage by which the population of the town increased each year between 2000 and 2010': A percentage increase would require a multiplicative model (e.g., 26,255 × (1+x)^10), not an additive one like 10x. ✗
  • Choice D — 'The projected population of the town 10 years after 2010': The equation describes the change from 2000 to 2010, not a projection. x = 69.5 is clearly not a population figure. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
